data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for engagement scoring.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the engagement scoring for follow-up segmentation, but the provided evidence does not include any details or endpoints related to engagement scoring mechanisms. Without concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate how engagement scoring is captured or utilized, the validation cannot be conclusively performed. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary information to assess the requirement is missing.
gaps: No evidence of engagement scoring mechanisms for follow-up segmentation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for engagement scoring
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify engagement scoring for follow-up segmentation.
